name: The Void Corridors
short_description: A first-person puzzle horror game where shifting corridors, challenging puzzles, and dwindling resources stand between you and survival.
detailed_description:
The Void Corridors is a first-person puzzle horror game where you navigate maze-like environments, solve intricate puzzles, and manage limited resources to survive.

Key Features

🔦 Resource Management – Scavenge for energy to keep your flashlight powered and maintain the generator that lights the corridors. Every second of illumination matters.

🧩 Puzzle Solving – Tackle a variety of environmental puzzles to unlock new areas, uncover hidden secrets, and descend deeper into the unknown.

🚪 Exploration & Atmosphere – Traverse dark, shifting hallways filled with an eerie glow. Stay vigilant—at times, it may feel as if the walls themselves are watching.

👁️ Psychological Horror – The deeper you go, the stronger the sense of being observed becomes. Unravel the mystery behind the corridors before the presence lurking in the shadows finds you.

Will you uncover the truth… or become lost in the void?
